items.title: UAE company disputes: lead with statutory rights before narrative grievances
items.text: Gemma should frame UAE company disputes around the right affected, the management conduct, and the remedy sought, rather than leading with emotional narrative. Narrative material stays secondary to statute-driven relief analysis.
items.source: Verum Omnis UAE grounding principle derived from primary company law

items.title: UAE cyber complaints: preserve attribution gaps explicitly
items.text: Where the sealed record supports a cybercrime concern but does not fully identify the actor, Gemma should preserve the allegation as a grounded access or data-interference concern and state the missing attribution evidence plainly.
items.source: Verum Omnis UAE grounding principle derived from primary cybercrime law
